title: João Banks’s CV
text:
Computer Science student focused on machine learning, data analysis, and backend development.

joao_banks@gmail.com | My LinkedIn page



Collaborating and contributing to production-level AI and software engineering environments.


Machine Learning, Data Analysis, system optimization, and building scalable ML systems.



Generative AI applications, predictive modeling, backend services, and leveraging quantitative metrics for performance.




2017 - 2019 SENAI

Informatics Maintenance and Support Technician
Configured and optimized 30+ computer systems, improving deployment efficiency by 25%

Expected April 2027 Brigham Young University-Idaho

Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
Minor in AI Engineering and Emphasis in Machine Learning




Current Chair member representative, Student Leadership Council, Department of Science, Mathematics and Engineering
Expected 2027 GPA: 4.0 - summa cum laude, Brigham Young University-Idaho






Libraries/Tools scikit-learn, NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Julia, MATLAB, R.



Languages/Frameworks Python, Java, Node.js, C#, PHP, Ruby, SQL, Express.js, Spring / Spring Boot, FastAPI, Flask, Django.




2022 - 2023 BEREAL Incubator, Project Manager

Coordinated a team of 45 developers in the creation of an interactive, visually scalable API for a social media platform.
Developed an entire social media ecosystem (HOTSPOT) in 5 months, mitigating network architecture and establishing a semi-autonomous client-server that acquired 5000 subscriptions in only 2 months of operation.
Promoted creativity and quantitative metrics that led to the exceeding performance and eventual acquisition of HOTSPOT by BeREAL.

2019 - 2021 Full-time Ecclesiastical Representative

Led a community of 360 volunteers in self-improvement and infrastructural projects in 7 countries in Africa.
Coordinated logistical planning and strategic meetings that led to the building of 7 elementary schools and philanthropic action that sustained destituted demographics.
